# @architecture/validate-i18n

Report-only i18n validation tool. Finds translation keys used in source files that are missing from en-GB.json. Promotes to a hard gate after ADR-ACT-0121 and ADR-ACT-0122 complete.

## Package identity

```text
Name: @architecture/validate-i18n
Version: 0.1.0
Component: validate-i18n
Type: tool
System: architecture-governance
Domain: architecture
Bounded context: architecture-governance
Owner: architecture
```

## Lifecycle

```text
Stage: experimental
Role: tooling
Class: experimental.tooling
Catalog lifecycle: experimental
Visibility: internal
Support level: experimental
Review cadence: on-change
```

## Ownership

```text
Owner: architecture
Change control: owner-review
Promotion eligible: true
Semver policy: internal-traceable
```

## Responsibilities

- Scan source files for i18n key usage patterns
- Compare used keys against en-GB.json definitions
- Report missing keys as warnings (report-only mode)

## Non-responsibilities

- Does not fail the build ? report-only until ADR-ACT-0121 and ADR-ACT-0122 complete
- Does not validate non-default locale files (future gate)
